name: flowfix-ai
description: AI receptionist, scheduler, and job-management for plumbers, electricians, and HVAC businesses.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n web,api -c blue,green "npm -w @flowfix/web run dev" "npm -w @flowfix/api run dev"
scripts.build: npm -w @flowfix/web run build && npm -w @flowfix/api run build
scripts.typecheck: npm -w @flowfix/shared run typecheck && npm -w @flowfix/web run typecheck && npm -w @flowfix/api run typecheck
